caption: The video showcases a political event featuring Narendra Modi and other officials. The setting is a stage decorated with orange and white banners. In the foreground, Narendra Modi is seated and wearing a white kurta with a saffron and green sash. To his right, other men are seated, some wearing traditional Indian attire including turbans and saffron-colored scarves. The backdrop consists of a repeated circular logo and the text "भारतीय जनता पार्टी स्थापना दिवस" in Hindi. At the bottom of the screen, a translucent orange banner displays "लाइव देखें" alongside social media icons and handles such as "@BJP4India" and the website "www.bjp.org/bjplive." Small text labels "प्रजानेत्री" and "दिल्ली" are visible in the upper corners. The scene remains static across the frames, with the individuals seated and the on-screen graphics remaining constant throughout the sequence.
